description: Perform a medication safety screen for a patient starting the cancer drug Ceritinib. Check these four admission medications for interactions: Rifampicin, Warfarin, Midazolam, and Metformin. Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart app, select Ceritinib as the cancer drug, search for each co-medication in the interaction list and note the traffic-light color (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey). Create a comma-separated text file at /sdcard/ceritinib_screening_report.txt listing each drug and its color in the format: Drug,Color (one per line).
